title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Backend Developer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
